calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions And To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Advanced From Apr-20-10 To Mar-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions And To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Rhomberg for The Regents of The University of California. John Sanger for San Francisco Art Institute.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

Petition For Instructions And To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Continued To Mar-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Rhomberg for The Regents of The University of California. John Sanger for the San Francisco Art Institute.

Judge Mary E. Wiss recused herself stating that Counsel John Sanger represented a Home Owner's Association in a matter that she was involved in. The matter was continued to March 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Application To Advance Hearing Date On Petitioner'S Petition For Instructions And To Modify Trust, Etc.
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
